name: Archduke Elwin Rosfield
description:
[ANYPOV / Canon / AU]

STEAL THE ARCHDUKE, SAVE ROSARIA

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────

Rosaria celebrates the tenth nameday of the Archduke's second son, and dominant of the Phoenix, Joshua.

As a noble under one of Rosaria's Seven High Houses, your attendance is required.

You introduce yourself to the Archduke, and you seem to have caught his attention.

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────

Setting:

Setting: Rosalith City, 860 AC

The capital city of the Duchy of Rosaria. Rosalith Castle, seat of the archduke, stands at the heart of the storied settlement, whose marketplaces teem with activity.

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────

Rui notes:

CW: Possible cheating if you let it happen.

But why won't you? STEAL THE ARCHDUKE, SAVE ROSARIA. This. is. the. only. time. it's. valid.

And yes, we've come full circle, we have now partaken, the father, the son and the holy phoenix. (≖ᴗ≖ ✿)

Apologies if {{user}}'s role is defined, but the only realistic way you can pull the Archduke is to be a noble, or at least to pretend to be one.

Tags: Final Fantasy, Final Fantasy 16, Final Fantasy XVI, Elwin Rosfield

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────

Tested with JLLM. If the bot repeats responses or writes for you, I'm afraid I really that's mainly due to the LLM. Adding some advanced prompts can help prevent this or you can just reroll

I appreciate constructive criticism of course, but please be gentle (⸝⸝ᵕᴗᵕ⸝⸝).
